cases.name: broken ha-conventions references removed
cases.description: Active skills/docs should not route to a non-existent ha-conventions skill.

cases.name: README invariant count consistency
cases.description: README should remain aligned to six safety invariants.

cases.name: core docs use explicit deploy wording
cases.description: Canonical docs should use explicit deploy-request wording.

cases.name: deploy settings schema includes branch and remote hierarchy
cases.description: Settings schema should preserve preferred deploy keys and legacy fallback keys.

cases.name: trace helper builds websocket URLs with api prefix
cases.description: Base-path Home Assistant installs should resolve to /api/websocket.

checks.command:
@'
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('trace_fetch', Path('helpers/trace-fetch.py'))
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
print(mod.build_ws_url('https://example.com/homeassistant'))
print(mod.build_ws_url('http://ha.local:8123'))
'@ | python -

@'

from pathlib import Path
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('trace_fetch', Path('helpers/trace-fetch.py'))
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
print(mod.build_ws_url('https://example.com/homeassistant'))
print(mod.build_ws_url('http://ha.local:8123'))
'@ | python -

cases.name: area search ignores empty metadata matches
cases.description: Blank registry fields should not match every area query.

checks.command:
@'
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('area_search', Path('helpers/area-search.py'))
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
print(mod.area_matches('', '', 'kitchen'))
print(mod.area_matches('kitchen', '', 'kitchen'))
'@ | python -

@'
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('area_search', Path('helpers/area-search.py'))
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
print(mod.area_matches('', '', 'kitchen'))
print(mod.area_matches('kitchen', '', 'kitchen'))
'@ | python -

cases.name: duplicate id regression half
cases.description: Harness should keep this regression case distinct from the capability case with the same id.
